rag_rules: Fix missing EOF errors by ensuring AGREE syntax is complete and properly terminated in annex blocks.
generic_rules: When repairing AGREE contracts, ensure all identifiers are visible and properly declared in the same annex scope.
Validate that guarantee expressions have valid types and do not reference unresolved identifiers.
Use only visible AADL features or equation helpers declared within the same annex for contract expressions.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component implementation annexes are used for assignments and bindings valid in that scope.
anti_patterns: Avoid adding new architecture elements when fixing AGREE diagnostics; focus on correcting syntax or resolving references.
irrelevant_topics: Component type annexes vs. implementation annexes (beyond syntax context)
